heading: Transfers from Department of Justice
label: 3445 Transfers from Department of Justice
text: There are transferred to the Secretary all functions of the Attorney General and of the Law Enforcement Assistance Administration with regard to the student loan and grant programs known as the law enforcement education program and the law enforcement intern program authorized by subsections (b), (c), and (f) of section 406 of the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act of 1968.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSection 406 of the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act of 1968, referred to in text, is , , , which was classified to , The Public Health and Welfare. Title I of the Act was amended generally by , , , and provisions formerly contained in section 406 of the Act were contained in section 705 of part G of title I of the Act, which was classified to . Subsequently, part G of title I of the Act was amended generally by , , , and, as so amended, did not contain a section 705 or similar provisions.section 406 of title I of Pub.
